smart_energy.name: Energy Monitoring Solutions
smart_energy.tagline: Smart grid, smart meters, energy optimization.
smart_energy.hero_sub: The energy IoT market is booming: connected meters, grid control, demand response and renewable integration. Outsource firmware, edge and cloud to expert startups.
smart_energy.intro: Smart Energy covers IoT projects that measure, control and optimize energy production, transmission and consumption. Utilities and industrials deploy sensors, gateways and cloud platforms to cut losses, prevent outages and integrate solar, storage and EVs.
smart_energy.market_text: Market potential ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐. Drivers: decarbonization, mandatory smart metering, aging grids, DER data explosion. Large accounts outsource embedded firmware, protocols (Modbus, DLMS, IEC), edge analytics and SCADA/cloud integration.

use_cases.text: Mass deployment of connected meters, remote reading, dynamic billing.

use_cases.text: Substation sensors, fault detection, load balancing, IT/OT integration.

use_cases.title: Site energy optimization
use_cases.text: Consumption control, demand response, weather and occupancy correlation.

use_cases.title: Renewables & storage monitoring
use_cases.text: Solar/wind production tracking, batteries, performance ratio and alerts.

faq.q: What skills for a Smart Energy project?
faq.a: Embedded firmware, energy protocols (DLMS, Modbus, IEC), edge gateways, AWS/Azure IoT integration, OT cybersecurity and time-series data.
Yes. You pay via escrow when you accept a startup and validate delivery (~10% platform commission).

faq.a: Yes — pick the domain at signup. Your profile and matching target energy sector missions.

asset_tracking.hero_sub: Know where your assets are — containers, equipment, pallets, vehicles — in real time. Iotplace connects logistics/industrial clients with RTLS/GPS startups.
asset_tracking.intro: Asset Tracking covers location and monitoring of mobile or distributed assets: vehicle fleets, containers, industrial tooling, site equipment. Technologies include GPS/GNSS, BLE beacons, UHF RFID, LoRaWAN, cellular NB-IoT and supply chain visibility platforms.
asset_tracking.market_text: Potential ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐. Global e-commerce, supply chain and traceability regulations drive deployments. Fast ROI on loss reduction, theft prevention and stock immobilization.

faq.q: GPS or BLE for my use case?
faq.a: GPS/GNSS for outdoor assets and fleets. BLE/UWB/RFID for indoor precision and warehouses. Iotplace startups often cover both with hybrid architecture.

faq.q: Can I run a PoC on 50 assets?
faq.a: Yes — typical PoC phase 3–6 months. Publish scope, indicative budget and expected stack on Iotplace.

predictive_maintenance.hero_sub: Cut unplanned downtime with sensors, edge and analytics. Iotplace connects industrial sites and IIoT startups.
predictive_maintenance.intro: Predictive maintenance uses sensors (vibration, temperature, current, acoustic), edge computing and ML models to anticipate failures on rotating machinery, production lines and critical infrastructure — before costly breakdowns.
predictive_maintenance.market_text: Potential ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐. Industry 4.0, hourly downtime cost and field maintenance shortages accelerate adoption. Typical projects: pilot 10–50 machines then site scale.
